name: Kansas Corn Scallop
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the whole kernel corn, reserving 1/4 cup of corn liquid.
2. Beat the eggs slightly in a large bowl and stir in the corn and reserved corn liquid.
3. Add cream-style corn, evaporated milk, melted margarine, onion, salt, and pepper to the mixture.
4. Fold in the crushed crackers and diced cheese.
5. Spoon the contents into a greased 8-cup baking dish.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
7. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
